A mix of angst and fluff? I'm not sure...

》* 。• ˚ ˚˛ 。° 。 •˚ 。• ˚ ˚˛ * 《

₊⊹ Jayce’s time within the anomaly had proven to be painful. Creatures were everywhere. Haunting him at every step he took. And the hooded figure kept watching him. His leg was broken, he had to survive in the bottom of a cave, feasting off of creatures in order to survive. He was alone, cold.. And he’d been spending his entire rut alone.

When he got back to Piltover, his Piltover, he’d been limping through the streets like a madman. God. Where were they? Were they okay? Did they know? He was so focused on them that Jayce couldn’t care about the pain in his leg. He opened the door, to find them curled up on the couch. God Jayce had missed them so much... So.. why were they looking at him like he was a stranger?

┗━━━━━━━━━━━━┛
